name: NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5 (representative subset)
source: NIST SP 800-53 Rev. 5 — abbreviated demo subset, not the full catalog

controls.title: Account Management
controls.statement: Manage system accounts: establishment, activation, modification, review, disabling, and removal. Define account types and assign managers.

controls.title: Least Privilege
controls.statement: Employ the principle of least privilege, allowing only authorized accesses for users (and processes) necessary to accomplish assigned tasks.

controls.title: Event Logging
controls.statement: Identify the event types the system is capable of logging in support of the audit function and coordinate the logging function with other entities.

controls.title: Audit Record Review, Analysis, and Reporting
controls.statement: Review and analyze system audit records for indications of inappropriate or unusual activity and report findings.

controls.title: Control Assessments
controls.statement: Develop a control assessment plan and assess the controls in the system and its environment of operation to determine effectiveness.

controls.title: Continuous Monitoring
controls.statement: Develop a system-level continuous monitoring strategy and implement ongoing assessment of control effectiveness.

controls.title: Baseline Configuration
controls.statement: Develop, document, and maintain a current baseline configuration of the system under configuration control.

controls.title: Configuration Settings
controls.statement: Establish and document configuration settings using hardening checklists (e.g., CIS, DISA STIG) and enforce them.

controls.title: System Backup
controls.statement: Conduct backups of user-level, system-level, and security-related information; protect the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of backups.

controls.title: Identification and Authentication (Organizational Users)
controls.statement: Uniquely identify and authenticate organizational users and associate that identity with processes acting on their behalf; enforce MFA.

controls.title: Authenticator Management
controls.statement: Manage system authenticators including initial distribution, complexity, rotation, and revocation.

controls.title: Incident Handling
controls.statement: Implement an incident handling capability covering preparation, detection and analysis, containment, eradication, and recovery.

controls.title: Incident Reporting
controls.statement: Require personnel to report suspected incidents within a defined time period and report incident information to designated authorities.

controls.title: Risk Assessment
controls.statement: Conduct a risk assessment, including the likelihood and magnitude of harm, and document the results.

controls.title: Vulnerability Monitoring and Scanning
controls.statement: Monitor and scan for vulnerabilities in the system and hosted applications; analyze reports and remediate within defined response times.

controls.title: Boundary Protection
controls.statement: Monitor and control communications at external and key internal boundaries; implement subnetworks for publicly accessible components.

controls.title: Cryptographic Protection
controls.statement: Implement approved cryptography to protect the confidentiality and integrity of information at rest and in transit.

controls.title: Flaw Remediation
controls.statement: Identify, report, and correct system flaws; install security-relevant updates within a defined time of release.

controls.title: System Monitoring
controls.statement: Monitor the system to detect attacks, indicators of potential attacks, and unauthorized connections; deploy monitoring devices.

controls.title: System Security and Privacy Plans
controls.statement: Develop, document, and maintain a system security plan that describes the system boundary, environment, and implemented controls.
